=====On hand=====
This listing is of Byron's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Byron
|pkmn=Bastiodon
|stage1=Armor Fossil
|stage2=Shieldon
|type1=Rock
|type2=Steel
|img=Byron Bastiodon.png
|epnum=DP107
|epname=Ancient Family Matters!
|vajp=Unshō Ishizuka
|vaen=Marc Thompson
|desc={{p|Bastiodon}} is Byron's main Pokémon. Prior to the start of the series, Byron revived Bastiodon from an [[Armor Fossil]] and [[Evolution|evolved]] {{p|Shieldon}} into a Bastiodon.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Byron
|pkmn=Bronzor
|type1=Steel
|type2=Psychic
|img=Byron Bronzor.png
|epnum=DP108
|epname=Dealing With Defensive Types!
|vajp=Daisuke Sakaguchi
|vaen=Tom Wayland
|desc={{p|Bronzor}} was the first Pokémon used by Byron during his [[Gym]] {{pkmn|battle}} against {{Ash}}. It went up against [[Ash's Chimchar]], and was able to stand up to Chimchar's {{m|Flamethrower}} thanks to Byron's intensive training. It was able to cause significant damage to Chimchar before being knocked out by {{m|Flame Wheel}}.

Bronzor's known moves are {{m|Rain Dance}} and {{m|Gyro Ball}}, and its Ability is {{a|Heatproof}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Byron
|pkmn=Steelix
|gender=male
|type1=Steel
|type2=Ground
|img=Byron Steelix.png
|epnum=DP108
|epname=Dealing With Defensive Types!
|vajp=Unshō Ishizuka
|vaen=Unshō Ishizuka
|desc=Byron's {{p|Steelix}} was seen for the first time in ''[[DP108|Dealing With Defensive Types!]]''. Steelix was the second Pokémon used by Byron when battling {{Ash}}, and proved to be a very tough opponent. He knocked out {{AP|Buizel}} easily, and was able to cause massive damage to {{AP|Chimchar}}. However he was eventually defeated by Chimchar after the Chimp Pokémon weakened the ground with {{m|Dig}} restricting his movement.

Steelix's known moves are {{m|Screech}}, {{m|Bind}}, and {{m|Iron Tail}}.}}
